description: Machine-readable input/output specification for the plannn3 benchmark example. Shapes and dtypes are taken from the golden reference sample (batch size 1); the leading batch dimension and per-sample token counts vary with the input.

stages.name: encoder
stages.detail: Consumes the 6 inputs and returns token embeddings, position embeddings, and next_hist_img_feat.

stages.name: prefill
stages.detail: Runs the transformer over the prompt tokens and returns the first-step trajectory logits.

stages.name: decode
stages.detail: 18 autoregressive steps; each step takes argmax over the logits to emit the next trajectory token.

inputs.name: pinhole_raw_img
inputs.description: Raw multi-view camera images indexed by multiview_cams_index; resized and centre-cropped inside the encoder.

inputs.name: hist_img_feat
inputs.description: Historical image feature cache carried over from the previous step.

inputs.name: subpath_polylines_mask
inputs.description: Validity mask for the sub-path polylines.

inputs.name: hist_action
inputs.description: Historical ego waypoints; the first 4 are used as input and the 5th seeds the crop projection point.

outputs.name: next_hist_img_feat
outputs.description: Updated history image feature cache for the next inference step (continuous; validated to a small relative tolerance under TF32).

outputs.name: traj_ids
outputs.description: Autoregressively generated trajectory tokens (3 meta-action tokens followed by 15 PCA trajectory tokens); validated bit-exactly against golden.
